verdict.headline: Safe to transact — wallet is ENS-doxxed as nick.eth, clean on sanctions, and has substantial on-chain history.
verdict.reasoning: Both sanctions sources (Chainalysis on-chain oracle and the x402 sanctions service) returned clean results, satisfying the hard-veto check. The wallet resolves via ENS reverse lookup to "nick.eth", a publicly-doxxed identity, which is strong positive evidence comparable to a known-safe label. On-chain history shows a healthy balance of ~149.66 ETH, consistent with an established, actively-used wallet. Labels returned no negative attribution from either the x402 labeler or the eth-labels registry, and no adverse web sentiment was found.

findings.finding: Chainalysis on-chain oracle reports isSanctioned=false and x402 sanctions service returned no matches against active lists.
No labels returned from x402 labeler or eth-labels registry; no negative attribution present.
Wallet holds ~149.66 ETH, indicating an established, actively-funded address.
ENS reverse lookup resolves to 'nick.eth' — wallet is publicly doxxed to a real identity (strong positive signal).
No adverse web sentiment hits (scam/exploit/hack/lawsuit) found.
